Issues: The design is very simplistic and lacks strong unique visual appeal necessary for high commercial sales.
The composition is basic. While the colors are bright, the overall design is repetitive of simple graphic styles, reducing its uniqueness.

The print quality assessment is difficult without knowing the final resolution and medium, but the simple line work and flat colors could lead to poor printing quality if not handled with high resolution.
The originality score is low as the concept relies on extremely basic illustrative elements.
